creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-10-17 07:10:22 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/py-shout       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Shout-python is a set of bindings for libshout2. It allows you to
  act as a source for icecast 1 and 2, and shoutcast.
  
  WWW: http://www.icecast.org/
  
  PR:             ports/139671
  Submitted by:   Olivier Duchateau <duchateau.olivier at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1072    +1 -0      ports/audio/Makefile
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/audio/py-shout/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/py-shout/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/audio/py-shout/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/py-shout/pkg-plist (new)
